positive: A stylized, geometric pop art design featuring a retro-futuristic cityscape viewed through a pair of oversized sunglasses. Bold lines, limited color palette (teal, magenta, yellow), halftone dots, vaporwave aesthetic, vector illustration style.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, realism, messy, gradients
